policyitem.name: GPL-2.0+
policyitem.desc: Process that runs independently, invoked by the X process.

filteritem.name: *.json|*.txt|*.gitignore|*.node-version|*.prettierrc|*.tool-versions|*.prettierignore|*.watchmanconfig|*.lock|*.podspec|*.pdf|*.har|*.gif|*.npmignore|*.hpp
filteritem.desc: desc files

filteritem.name: LICENSE.MIT
filteritem.desc: 版权文件，不添加版权头

filteritem.desc: 第三方开源软件源码，不修改版权头，以防有修改版权风险
